# videoProvider

**Instance Property**

An object that retrieves data corresponding to a representative video for the URL.

## Declaration

```swift
var videoProvider: NSItemProvider? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The item provider returns a video that [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AVFoundation] can play.

## Getting the link’s video

- **remoteVideoURL**: A remote URL corresponding to a representative video for the URL.
